page_content:
TLPL704 Research Methodologies and Educational Practice (3 Credits) Introduction to methodological approaches commonly used in educational research with a focus on addressing issues in teaching and learning, schools and communities, and educational policy. Restriction: Must be in Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership Master of Arts program; or permission of instructor. Credit Only Granted for: TLPL788W or TLPL704. Formerly: TLPL788W.

TLPL699 Master's Seminar (3 Credits) Directed study for master's degree students writing seminar papers. Credit Only Granted for: EDPS679 or TLPL699. Formerly: EDPS679.

TLPL700 Theory and Research in Computer Education (3 Credits) Examination of the current research and theory in the instructional uses of computers, instructional tutoring systems, computer programing environments, computer-based laboratories and problem solving environments in educational settings. Prerequisite: TLPL600, EDMS645, and TLPL691; or permission of EDUC- Teaching and Learning, Policy and Leadership department. Credit Only Granted for: EDCI783 or TLPL700. Formerly: EDCI783.
